episodes.title: #ICAM2024 - Webpanel - Twin Flames Universe Survivor Panel
episodes.description:
Escaping High-Control Groups: Insights from Twin Flames Universe Survivors

In this powerful and emotional webinar, Dr. Chapman, a PhD candidate specializing in victimology for coercive and high-demand groups, moderates a panel featuring survivors of the Twin Flames Universe group and their supporters. The discussion delves into their personal journeys of escape, the psychological manipulation they faced, the importance of education on coercive control, and the need for policy changes to protect others from similar situations. The session emphasizes the strength and resilience of the survivors, the significance of community support, and offers hope to those still trapped in high-control environments.

00:00 Introduction and Opening Remarks

12:29 Challenges and Ethical Concerns

28:19 Leaving One Cult for Another
28:57 The Impact of Victim Blaming
29:52 Imagining Protective Policies
30:58 Understanding Coercive Control
37:56 The Role of Coaching in High Control Groups
40:50 Community Support for Survivors
46:02 Survivors Shaping Policies
50:30 Closing Remarks and Final Thoughts

episodes.title: International Cult Awareness Month Webpanel: Policy and Cults
episodes.description:
Navigating Cult Awareness and Policy: Insights from Experts

Live Web Panel about policies and how they can help victims of cults and coercive control. Guest speakers Lisa Kendall and John Heath Edward join Dr. Tabitha Chapman, PhD-c with guests from all over the world to discuss policies that can help those who need it most.

29:13 Challenges in Supporting Cult Survivors

episodes.title: International Cult Awareness Month: Migration, Trafficking, Cults
episodes.description:
International Cult Awareness: Immigration and Cult Vulnerabilities with Dr. Rincon

Join us in the inaugural episode of the International Cult Awareness Month podcast series, where host Dr. Chapman converses with Dr. Giselle Rincon. Dr. Rincon, recommended by Lisa Kendall of the CounterCult Coalition, shares insights on the migration crisis, mainly focusing on Venezuelan immigrants' vulnerabilities to cult recruitment and coercive situations. The discussion delves into the sociopolitical landscape influencing migration, the risk factors migrants face, and the importance of community and education in protecting these individuals. In this comprehensive episode, learn about the challenges and proactive measures for safeguarding immigrants.

https://www.venezuelasvoiceinoregon.org/
